_comment: MCP configuration for GitHub Copilot Coding Agent.
Per GitHub docs, this JSON does NOT live in the repo — it goes in:
Settings → Code & automation → Copilot → Cloud agent → MCP configuration
This file is a REFERENCE COPY committed so the team can review/edit before pasting.
Secret naming convention: variables/secrets referenced here MUST be prefixed
COPILOT_MCP_* — Coding Agent does not see other GH secrets.
